'''Jedi Cruisers''' were [[Transport/Legends|transports]] used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]].

==History==
Two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Cruiser/Legends|Cruisers]] were sent from [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] to assist [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] during the Uprising. They landed under heavy fire on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and successfully unloaded their passengers.

==Behind the scenes==
This [[Starship/Legends|ship]] type should not be confused with the [[Jedi Justice Cruiser]] used millennia later.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]
